game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **斯特恩大陆 - 巨龙的威胁 (Stern Continent - Threat of the Dragon):** This management simulation game tasks players with developing a small animal village by tapping on buildings and resources to interact and manage production. Players assign villagers to gather raw materials like wood and stone, which are then processed in specialized buildings (e.g., a sawmill for wood, a forge for metal) into refined goods. New hunter types are unlocked through village progression, allowing players to recruit and train them, equipping them with crafted weapons and armor made from processed materials. Hunters are then formed into an "Alliance" (e.g., 3-member party) and dispatched on expeditions to combat "巨型生物" (giant creatures) in semi-automated battles, with success yielding rare resources and experience. Players can also craft "药剂" (potions) to aid hunters and engage with "贸易商船" (trade ships) arriving every 12 hours to exchange goods. The core loop involves resource management, crafting, and hunter deployment, with the ultimate objective being to strengthen the village and its hunters sufficiently to defeat the menacing giant dragon.
game_info.description: Welcome to Stern Continent! You are the village chief tasked with developing a thriving settlement and protecting it from the menacing dragon. Gather resources, construct buildings, assign villagers to work, craft equipment, and train hunters to form alliances that battle giant creatures. Manage your village economy wisely—process raw materials into refined goods, craft potions, and trade with merchant ships. Your ultimate goal is to build a powerful enough force to defeat the dragon threatening your land.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/select buildings and UI elements
Space: Interact with selected building/resource, assign workers, or confirm actions
Z: Open crafting menu or send alliance on expedition
Shift: Speed up time (hold to accelerate resource production)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction test. Validates that the player can navigate the village, interact with buildings, and assign villagers to gather resources. Tests fundamental game mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through different buildings using arrow keys. Interact with resource nodes to assign villagers. Check that resources accumulate over time and that buildings respond to player input correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates the interface, assigns villagers to resource gathering, and observes resource accumulation. All basic interactions work without errors, confirming core mechanics function properly.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Implements optimal strategy to defeat the dragon by efficiently managing resources, crafting equipment, training hunters, and defeating progressively stronger giant creatures to build up strength.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Rapidly assign villagers to gather wood and stone. Build processing buildings (sawmill, forge). Craft weapons and armor for hunters. Train multiple hunters, form alliances, and send them on expeditions against creatures. Use time acceleration to speed up production. Progress through creature tiers until strong enough to challenge and defeat the dragon.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The village develops efficiently, hunters are trained and equipped, alliances defeat giant creatures successfully, and ultimately the dragon is conquered. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state, validating the complete gameplay loop and win condition.
